Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	@parser::members {
     8	    #include "ASTBuilder.h"
     9	    #include <nlohmann/json.hpp>
    10	    using json = nlohmann::json;
    11	    
    12	    ASTBuilder astBuilder;
    13	    
    14	    void printAST(const asg::Node* node) {
    15	        json j = astBuilder.buildJSON(node);
    16	        std::cout << j.dump(2) << std::endl;
    17	    }
    18	}
    19	
    20	compilationUnit
    21	    :   translationUnit? EOF
    22	    ;
    23	
    24	translationUnit
    25	    :   externalDeclaration+
    26	    ;
    27	
    28	externalDeclaration
    29	    :   functionDefinition
    30	    |   declaration
    31	    ;
    32	
    33	functionDefinition
    34	    : declarationSpecifiers declarator compoundStatement
    35	    {
    36	        auto func = astBuilder.makeFunction($declarator.ctx, $compoundStatement.ctx);
    37	        printAST(func);
    38	    }
    39	    ;
    40	
    41	declaration
    42	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? ';'
    43	    {
    44	        auto decls = astBuilder.makeDeclaration($declarationSpecifiers.ctx, $initDeclaratorList.ctx);
    45	        for (auto decl : decls) {
    46	            printAST(decl);
    47	        }
    48	    }
    49	    ;
    50	
    51	declarationSpecifiers
    52	    :   typeSpecifier+
    53	    ;
    54	
    55	typeSpecifier
    56	    :   Int
    57	    |   Void
    58	    ;
    59	
    60	declarator
    61	    :   Identifier
    62	    |   declarator '[' ']'
    63	    |   declarator '[' assignmentExpression ']'
    64	    |   declarator '(' ')'
    65	    |   declarator '(' parameterList ')'
    66	    ;
    67	
    68	initDeclaratorList
    69	    :   initDeclarator (',' initDeclarator)*
    70	    ;
    71	
    72	initDeclarator
    73	    :   declarator
    74	    |   declarator '=' initializer
    75	    ;
    76	
    77	initializer

    79	    |   '{' initializerList '}'
    80	    |   '{' '}'
    81	    ;
    82

    85	    ;
    86
